nasb.text: behold, I have done according to your words. Behold, I have given you a wise and discerning heart, so that there has been no one like you before you, nor shall one like you arise after you.

esv.text: behold, I now do according to your word. Behold, I give you a wise and discerning mind, so that none like you has been before you and none like you shall arise after you.

cnv.text: 我就照著你所求的而行；賜給你一個智慧和明辨的心，在你以前沒有人像你，在你以後也不會有人像你。

ccb.text: 我必应允你，赐给你空前绝后的智慧和悟性。
